queries.name: User pending opps
queries.sql:
WITH assign_split AS (SELECT SUBSTR(CAST(created_on AS STRING), 1, 10) AS Date_Created, split(assigned_to,',') AS assigned_to,
ROUND(m_value,2) AS Value 
FROM `KEYSTONE.COGNIZANCE_card_archive` AS archive
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.kanban_lists` AS lists 
ON archive.list_id = lists.id
WHERE lists.key in ('LM4') AND level= 1
AND PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(cast(`date` as string),1,10) ) 
between PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '2024-01-01') AND  PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '')),assign_split_details AS (SELECT SUBSTR(CAST(created_on AS STRING), 1, 10) AS Date_Created, split(assigned_to,',') AS assigned_to,
ROUND(m_value,2) AS Value, opportunity_type
FROM `KEYSTONE.COGNIZANCE_card_details` AS details
LEFT
JOIN `KEYSTONE.COGNIZANCE_card_status` AS status
ON details.id = status.id
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.kanban_lists` AS lists 
ON status.list_id = lists.id
WHERE lists.key in ('LM4') AND level= 1
AND PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(cast(`created_on` as string),1,10) )<= PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '')), 

pending AS  
(SELECT * FROM (SELECT assigned_to, ROUND(SUM(Value),2) AS sum_opp, opportunity_type
FROM assign_split_details
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(assign_split_details.assigned_to) AS assigned_to
WHERE assigned_to != '' AND assigned_to IS NOT NULL

GROUP BY assigned_to, opportunity_type
ORDER BY sum_opp DESC))
SELECT pending.assigned_to AS assigned_to, 
IFNULL(pending.sum_opp,0) as value, opportunity_type
FROM pending 
--where pending.assigned_to =

queries.name: User Resolved Opps
queries.sql:
WITH assign_split AS (SELECT SUBSTR(CAST(created_on AS STRING), 1, 10) AS Date_Created, split(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(assigned_to, '\"', ''), ' ', ''), '[', ''), ']', ''), ',') AS assigned_to,
ROUND(m_value *7,2) AS Value, opportunity_type
FROM `KEYSTONE._card_archive` AS archive
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.kanban_lists` AS lists 
ON archive.list_id = lists.id
WHERE lists.key in ('LM4') 
-- 
AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(opp_label, '"0a5c25c7-911b-4d3f-bef7-5326a19fc897"') AND level= 1), 
assign_split_details AS (
SELECT SUBSTR(CAST(created_on AS STRING), 1, 10) AS Date_Created, assigned_to,
ROUND(m_value *7,2) AS Value, opportunity_type
FROM `KEYSTONE._card_details` AS details
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE._card_status` AS status
ON details.id = status.id
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.kanban_lists` AS lists 
ON status.list_id = lists.id
WHERE lists.key in ('LM4')
-- 
AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(opp_label, '"0a5c25c7-911b-4d3f-bef7-5326a19fc897"') 
AND level= 1),
resolved AS  (
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT assigned_to, ROUND(SUM(Value),2) AS sum_opp, opportunity_type
FROM assign_split
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(assign_split.assigned_to) AS assigned_to
WHERE assigned_to != '' AND assigned_to IS NOT NULL

GROUP BY assigned_to, opportunity_type
ORDER BY sum_opp DESC))
SELECT resolved.assigned_to AS assigned_to, ifnull(sum_opp,0) as value, opportunity_type
FROM resolved
--where resolved.assigned_to =

WITH assign_split AS (
SELECT SUBSTR(CAST(created_on AS STRING), 1, 10) AS Date_Created, split(TRIM(TRIM(assigned_to, '['), ']'),',') AS assigned_to,
ROUND(m_value *7,2) AS Value
FROM `KEYSTONE.COGNIZANCE_card_archive` AS archive
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.kanban_lists` AS lists 
ON archive.list_id = lists.id

AND level= 1
AND PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(cast(`date` as string),1,10) ) 
between PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '2024-01-01') AND  PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '2024-05-08')),

assign_split_details AS (
    SELECT SUBSTR(CAST(created_on AS STRING), 1, 10) AS Date_Created, split(TRIM(TRIM(assigned_to, '['), ']'),',') AS assigned_to,
ROUND(m_value *7,2) AS Value 
FROM `KEYSTONE.COGNIZANCE_card_details` AS details
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.COGNIZANCE_card_status` AS status
ON details.id = status.id
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.kanban_lists` AS lists 
ON status.list_id = lists.id
WHERE lists.key in ('LM4') 
-- 
AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(opp_label, '"0a5c25c7-911b-4d3f-bef7-5326a19fc897"') 
AND level= 1
AND PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(cast(`created_on` as string),1,10)) 
<= PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '2024-05-08')), 

pending AS  (
    SELECT * FROM (SELECT assigned_to, ROUND(SUM(Value),2) AS sum_opp
FROM assign_split_details 
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(assign_split_details.assigned_to) AS assigned_to
WHERE assigned_to != '' AND assigned_to IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY sum_opp DESC)),

resolved AS  (
    SELECT * FROM (
SELECT assigned_to, ROUND(SUM(Value),2) AS sum_opp
FROM assign_split
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(assign_split.assigned_to) AS assigned_to
WHERE assigned_to != '' AND assigned_to IS NOT NULL

GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY sum_opp DESC))

SELECT IFNULL(pending.sum_opp,0) as pending_sum_opp FROM 
pending FULL OUTER JOIN resolved
ON pending.assigned_to = resolved.assigned_to
--where TRIM(TRIM(resolved.assigned_to), '\"') =

queries.name: Price Last Sold
queries.sql:
with daterange as (

SELECT DATE_TRUNC(day, WEEK) week
FROM UNNEST(GENERATE_DATE_ARRAY(date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) , CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) AS day
where day BETWEEN  date_sub(date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) , INTERVAL 1 DAY) 
and CURRENT_DATE() group by week),

test as (
SELECT ifnull(Sales_Qty,0) as Sales_Qty, IFNULL(round(Sales_Value/Sales_Qty),0) Price, week
FROM (
SELECT ROUND(sum(Sales_Value),2) as Sales_Value,   ROUND(sum(Sales_Qty),2) as Sales_Qty, 
DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", Date), WEEK) as week 
FROM 
KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW 
where PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(Date,1,10)) 
between date_sub(date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) , INTERVAL 1 DAY) 
and date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) 
and SKU_Description = 'CERES NECTAR ORANGE BLISS 12X1L'
and Customer_Name = 'CASH'
and Sales_Qty > 0
group by  DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", Date), WEEK)))

select daterange.week, coalesce(Sales_Qty,0) as Sales_Qty, coalesce(Price,0) as Price
from daterange
left JOIN test
on daterange.week = test.week
where daterange.week between date_sub(date_sub(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) , INTERVAL 1 DAY) 
and CURRENT_DATE()

queries.name: asd
queries.sql:
SELECT SKU_Description, AVG_REPLENISHMENT_CYCLE as Sales_Frequency\r
FROM (\r
\r
SELECT SKU_Description, round(AVG(REPLENISHMENT_CYCLE)) AS AVG_REPLENISHMENT_CYCLE, count(*) AS COUNTER\r
FROM (\r
\r
SELECT *, \r
DATE_DIFF(PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(Date,1,10) ),PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(LAG_DATE,1,10) ), DAY) \r
AS REPLENISHMENT_CYCLE\r
FROM ( \r
select *, LAG(Date)\r
   OVER (PARTITION BY Customer_Name, SKU_Description ORDER BY Date ASC) AS LAG_DATE\r
from (\r
 \r
SELECT Customer_Name, SKU_Description, Sales_Value, Sales_Qty, Date\r
 \r
from KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW\r
\r
where \r
Customer_Name = 'CASH' \r
and Variant = JSON_VALUE('{"Brand":"LAYS","Category":"Snack","City":"MAPUTO","Country":"Mozambique","Customer_Code":"MP-JOA0054","Customer_Name":"JOAO","Flavour":"Sweet & Smoky American BBQ","Region":"Other","SKU_Description":"LAYS SMOKEY BBQ 20X105G","SKU_Number":"SM150423","Supplier":"PEPSICO","Trade_Channel":"Other","Variant":"POTATO CHIPS"}', '$.Variant')\r
AND  Supplier = JSON_VALUE('{"Brand":"LAYS","Category":"Snack","City":"MAPUTO","Country":"Mozambique","Customer_Code":"MP-JOA0054","Customer_Name":"JOAO","Flavour":"Sweet & Smoky American BBQ","Region":"Other","SKU_Description":"LAYS SMOKEY BBQ 20X105G","SKU_Number":"SM150423","Supplier":"PEPSICO","Trade_Channel":"Other","Variant":"POTATO CHIPS"}', '$.Supplier')\r
\r
and Sales_Qty > 0\r
and\r
extract(year from PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(Date,1,10) )) >= 2021\r
\r
ORDER BY Customer_Name, Date ASC\r
)\r
ORDER BY Customer_Name, SKU_Description, Date\r
\r
)\r
)\r
GROUP BY SKU_Description\r
ORDER BY AVG_REPLENISHMENT_CYCLE DESC\r
) \r
where AVG_REPLENISHMENT_CYCLE is not null\r
and SKU_Description is not null\r
\r

queries.name: Costing query
queries.sql:
DECLARE  current_on_demand_price_per_tb INT64 DEFAULT 5;\r
DECLARE  new_on_demand_price_per_tb FLOAT64 DEFAULT 6.25;\r
DECLARE standard_edition_price FLOAT64 DEFAULT 0.04;\r
DECLARE standard_edition_factor FLOAT64 DEFAULT 1.5;\r
\r
DECLARE dt_start DEFAULT TIMESTAMP("2024-01-01 00:00:00") ;\r
DECLARE dt_end DEFAULT TIMESTAMP("2024-06-18 23:59:59");\r
--SET @@dataset_project_id = 'my-project-id';\r
\r
\r
\r
WITH\r
  seconds AS (\r
  SELECT\r
\r
    period_start,\r
    SUM(period_slot_ms) AS period_slot_ms,\r
    SUM(period_slot_ms/1000)/(60*60) AS slot_hour,\r
  FROM\r
    `region-us`.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.JOBS_TIMELINE_BY_PROJECT\r
  WHERE\r
    period_start BETWEEN dt_start AND dt_end\r
    AND reservation_id IS NULL\r
    AND job_id NOT LIKE 'script_%'\r
    AND period_slot_ms > 0\r
    AND total_bytes_billed > 0\r
    AND job_type ='QUERY'\r
  GROUP BY     period_start ),\r
  slots AS (\r
  SELECT\r
\r
    TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(period_start, MONTH) AS period_start,\r
    ROUND(SUM(slot_hour), 2) AS total_slot_hours_usage,\r
    -- Calculating the diff between the avalaible committed slots to the usage (per minute)\r
  FROM     seconds\r
  GROUP BY    period_start   ORDER BY     period_start ASC),\r
 jobs AS (\r
  SELECT\r
    TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(creation_time, MONTH) AS creation_time,\r
    -- For on-demand projects the minimum bytes processed is 10MB, so need to account for that\r
    SUM(IF(COALESCE(total_bytes_billed, 0) / POW(1024, 2) < 10, 10*POW(1024, 2), COALESCE(total_bytes_billed, 0)) ) AS total_bytes_billed_on_demand,\r
  FROM\r
   `region-us`.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.JOBS_BY_PROJECT\r
  WHERE\r
    creation_time BETWEEN dt_start AND dt_end\r
    AND reservation_id IS NULL\r
    AND job_id NOT LIKE 'script_%'\r
    AND total_slot_ms > 0     AND total_bytes_billed > 0  AND job_type = 'QUERY'\r
  GROUP BY\r
TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(creation_time, MONTH))\r
  SELECT\r
\r
  FORMAT_TIMESTAMP("%m-%Y", period_start) as month,\r
  ROUND(total_bytes_billed_on_demand / POW(1024, 4), 2) AS TiB_billed,\r
  ROUND(total_bytes_billed_on_demand / POW(1024, 4) * new_on_demand_price_per_tb, 2) AS new_on_demand_price,\r
  ROUND(total_slot_hours_usage, 2) AS total_slot_hours_usage,\r
  ROUND(total_slot_hours_usage*standard_edition_factor, 2) AS total_slot_hours_usage_factor,\r
  ROUND(total_slot_hours_usage*0.04, 2) AS total_slot_hours_cost,\r
  ROUND(total_slot_hours_usage*standard_edition_price*standard_edition_factor, 2) AS total_slot_hours_cost_factor_150,\r
  ROUND(ROUND(total_slot_hours_usage*standard_edition_price*standard_edition_factor, 2)/\r
        ROUND(total_bytes_billed_on_demand / POW(1024, 4) * new_on_demand_price_per_tb, 2),2)*100 AS ratio_percantage,\r
FROM\r
  jobs\r
JOIN\r
  slots\r
ON\r
  jobs.creation_time = slots.period_start\r
ORDER BY\r
  slots.period_start ASC;

queries.name: Autoscaler upper limit
queries.sql:
DECLARE\r
  dt_start DEFAULT TIMESTAMP("2024-01-01 00:00:00") ;\r
DECLARE\r
  dt_end DEFAULT TIMESTAMP("2024-06-30 00:00:00");\r
--SET @@dataset_project_id = 'my-project-id';\r
\r
WITH\r
  max_config AS (\r
  WITH\r
    p90_hour AS (\r
    SELECT\r
      TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(jbo.period_start, HOUR) AS usage_date,\r
      jbo.reservation_id,\r
\r
      jbo.job_type,\r
      -- Aggregate total_slots_ms used for all jobs on this day and divide\r
      -- by the number of milliseconds in a day. Most accurate for days with consistent slot usage\r
      ROUND(SUM(jbo.period_slot_ms) / (1000 * 60 * 60)) AS sum_hourly_slot_usage_in_hours\r
    FROM\r
      `region-us`.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.JOBS_TIMELINE_BY_PROJECT jbo\r
    WHERE\r
      (jbo.statement_type != "SCRIPT"\r
        OR jbo.statement_type IS NULL)\r
      AND jbo.job_type = 'QUERY'\r
      AND reservation_id IS NULL\r
      AND jbo.period_start BETWEEN dt_start\r
      AND dt_end-- Avoid duplicate byte counting in parent and children jobs.\r
    GROUP BY\r
      usage_date,\r
\r
      jbo.job_type,\r
      jbo.reservation_id\r
    ORDER BY\r
      usage_date DESC)\r
  SELECT\r
\r
    PERCENTILE_CONT(sum_hourly_slot_usage_in_hours,0.9) OVER() AS p90_hourly_slot_usage\r
  FROM\r
    p90_hour\r
    where sum_hourly_slot_usage_in_hours > 100\r
  LIMIT\r
    1 )\r
SELECT\r
\r
dt_start,\r
dt_end,\r
  p90_hourly_slot_usage,\r
  CEIL(p90_hourly_slot_usage/100)*100 as inital_max_configuration\r
FROM\r
  max_config;

queries.name: 5 top users table
queries.sql:
WITH archive_split AS (
SELECT SUBSTR(CAST(created_on AS STRING), 1, 10) AS Date_Created, split(TRIM(TRIM(assigned_to, '['), ']'),',') AS assigned_to,
ROUND(m_value * 7,2) AS Value 
FROM `KEYSTONE.COGNIZANCE_card_archive` 
AS archive
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.kanban_lists` AS lists 
ON archive.list_id = lists.id
WHERE lists.key in ('LM4') 
AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(opp_label, '"0a5c25c7-911b-4d3f-bef7-5326a19fc897"') AND level= 1 
-- 
AND PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(cast(`date` as string),1,10) )
between PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '2024-01-01') AND  PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '2024-05-08')),
details_split AS (SELECT SUBSTR(CAST(created_on AS STRING), 1, 10) 
AS Date_Created, split(TRIM(TRIM(assigned_to, '['), ']'),',') AS assigned_to,
FROM `KEYSTONE.COGNIZANCE_card_details` AS details
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.COGNIZANCE_card_status` AS status ON details.id = status.id
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.kanban_lists` AS lists ON status.list_id = lists.id
WHERE lists.key in ('LM4') AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(opp_label, '"0a5c25c7-911b-4d3f-bef7-5326a19fc897"') 
AND level= 1 
-- 
AND PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(cast(`created_on` as string),1,10) )<= PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '2024-05-08')),
pending AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT assigned_to, ROUND(SUM(Value),2) AS sum_opp_pending
FROM details_split
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(details_split.assigned_to) AS assigned_to 
WHERE assigned_to != '' AND assigned_to IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY sum_opp_pending DESC)),
resolved AS (SELECT * FROM (
SELECT assigned_to, ROUND(SUM(Value),2) AS sum_opp_resolved
FROM archive_split
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(archive_split.assigned_to) AS assigned_to
WHERE assigned_to != '' AND assigned_to IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY sum_opp_resolved DESC)), 
conv_rat AS ( SELECT assigned_to, IFNULL(ROUND(SUM(sum_opp_resolved)/NULLIF(SUM(sum_opp_pending) + SUM(sum_opp_resolved),0),2),0) AS Efficiency_Rate
FROM ( 
SELECT IF(pending.assigned_to IS NULL, resolved.assigned_to, pending.assigned_to) AS assigned_to, IFNULL(pending.sum_opp_pending,0) AS sum_opp_pending, IFNULL(resolved.sum_opp_resolved,0) AS sum_opp_resolved
FROM pending
FULL OUTER JOIN resolved
ON pending.assigned_to = resolved.assigned_to)
GROUP BY assigned_to), store_rat AS (SELECT assigned_to, IFNULL(ROUND(SUM(sum_opp_resolved)/NULLIF(SUM(sum_opp_pending),0)*100,2),0) AS Store_Perc_Ratio
FROM (
SELECT IF(pending.assigned_to IS NULL, resolved.assigned_to, pending.assigned_to) AS assigned_to,
IFNULL(pending.sum_opp_pending,0) AS sum_opp_pending, IFNULL(resolved.sum_opp_resolved,0) AS sum_opp_resolved
FROM pending 
FULL OUTER JOIN resolved
ON pending.assigned_to = resolved.assigned_to)GROUP BY assigned_to)
SELECT resolved.assigned_to AS Username, sum_opp_resolved AS Contribution, 
Efficiency_Rate
FROM resolved
FULL OUTER JOIN conv_rat
ON resolved.assigned_to = conv_rat.assigned_to
FULL OUTER JOIN store_rat
ON resolved.assigned_to = store_rat.assigned_to 
WHERE resolved.assigned_to IS NOT NULL 
ORDER BY Contribution DESC
LIMIT 5

\r
from (\r

 \r
 \r

\r

queries.sql:
\r
with Customer_Stage as (\r
  SELECT EXTR_Customer_Name, IF((EXTR_90_Days+EXTR_90plus_Days)>0, "stage3", IF(EXTR_60_Days>0, "stage2", "stage1")) Stage from (\r
SELECT EXTR_Customer_Name, SUM(EXTR_90_Days) EXTR_90_Days, SUM(EXTR_90plus_Days) EXTR_90plus_Days, SUM(EXTR_60_Days) EXTR_60_Days, SUM(EXTR_30_Days) EXTR_30_Days, SUM(EXTR_Current) EXTR_Current, SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy) EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy from QUINCE.xfinFIN\r
where TRIM(SIC_Sector) != ''\r
group by EXTR_Customer_Name\r
))\r
\r
SELECT TRIM(SIC_Sector) SIC_Sector, \r
ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN Stage="stage1" THEN EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy ELSE 0 END) / SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy), 0),2) AS Stage1,\r
ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN Stage="stage2" THEN EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy ELSE 0 END) / SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy), 0),2) AS Stage2,\r
ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN Stage="stage3" THEN EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy ELSE 0 END) / SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy), 0),2) AS Stage3,\r
ROUND(AVG(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy),2) Average_PV\r
from (\r
SELECT A.*, Stage  from QUINCE.xfinFIN A\r
\r
left join Customer_Stage CS on \r
A.EXTR_Customer_Name = CS.EXTR_Customer_Name\r
\r
where TRIM(SIC_Sector) != ''\r
\r
 and PARSE_DATE("%Y%m%d", REGEXP_EXTRACT(Filename, r'([0-9]{8})')) >= PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", "2017-01-01")  \r
 and PARSE_DATE("%Y%m%d", REGEXP_EXTRACT(Filename, r'([0-9]{8})')) <= PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", "2024-04-04")  \r
\r
\r
)\r
group by SIC_Sector\r
order by SIC_Sector asc\r

queries.name: Staging Table - Franchise
queries.sql:
WITH Table_1 AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(Franchise_Name) AS Franchise_Name,
    EXTR_Customer_Name,
    FS_Deal_Rating,
    Recourse_perc,
    IF((EXTR_90_Days + EXTR_90plus_Days) > 0, 'stage3', IF(EXTR_60_Days > 0, 'stage2', 'stage1')) AS Stage,
    DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y%m%d', REGEXP_EXTRACT(Filename, r'([0-9]{8})')), MONTH) AS Date,
    EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy
  FROM 
    QUINCE.xfinFIN
)

SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT 
    Franchise_Name, 
    EXTR_Customer_Name, 
    Date,
    CONCAT(
      CASE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM Date)
        WHEN 1 THEN 'January'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'February'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'March'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'April'
        WHEN 5 THEN 'May'
        WHEN 6 THEN 'June'
        WHEN 7 THEN 'July'
        WHEN 8 THEN 'August'
        WHEN 9 THEN 'September'
        WHEN 10 THEN 'October'
        WHEN 11 THEN 'November'
        WHEN 12 THEN 'December'
        ELSE 'Unknown'
      END, ' ',
      CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Date) AS STRING)
    ) AS Year_Month,
    FS_Deal_Rating, 
    Recourse_perc, 
    EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy,
    ROUND(IFNULL(100 * SUM(CASE WHEN Stage = 'stage1' THEN EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy), 0), 0), 2) AS Stage_1_Perc,
    ROUND(IFNULL(100 * SUM(CASE WHEN Stage = 'stage2' THEN EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy), 0), 0), 2) AS Stage_2_Perc,
    ROUND(IFNULL(100 * SUM(CASE WHEN Stage = 'stage3' THEN EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy), 0), 0), 2) AS Stage_3_Perc
  FROM 
    Table_1
  WHERE 
    TRIM(Franchise_Name) != ''
    AND 1=1



 


  GROUP BY 
    Franchise_Name,
    FS_Deal_Rating,
    Recourse_perc,
    Year_Month,
    EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy,
    EXTR_Customer_Name,
    Date

  ORDER BY 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Date), 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM Date), 
    Franchise_Name ASC
)
WHERE 
  1=1
  
LIMIT 100;

queries.name: Product Vs PV Per Month
queries.sql:
WITH 
    Data 
AS
( 
SELECT 
    Lines_of_Business_Level_Description AS Product,
    DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE("%Y%m%d", REGEXP_EXTRACT(Filename, r'([0-9]{8})')), MONTH) AS Date,
    SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy) AS Pv_Plus_Cap,
FROM 
    QUINCE.xfinFIN 
GROUP BY 
    Lines_of_Business_Level_Description,
    Date
ORDER BY 
    Date DESC
LIMIT 1000
)

,DateRange 
AS 
(
  SELECT 
    MAX(Date) AS max_date
  FROM 
    Data
)

,mainT
AS
(
SELECT 
    Product,
    m.Date As Date,
    Pv_Plus_Cap,
    CONCAT
    (
    CASE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM m.Date)
        WHEN 1 THEN 'January'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'February'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'March'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'April'
        WHEN 5 THEN 'May'
        WHEN 6 THEN 'June'
        WHEN 7 THEN 'July'
        WHEN 8 THEN 'August'
        WHEN 9 THEN 'September'
        WHEN 10 THEN 'October'
        WHEN 11 THEN 'November'
        WHEN 12 THEN 'December'
        ELSE 'Unknown'
    END, ' ',
        CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM m.Date) AS STRING)
    )  
    AS 
        Month_And_Year,
FROM
    Data m,
    DateRange r
WHERE 1=1
AND 
    m.Date 
        BETWEEN 
            DATE_SUB(r.max_date, INTERVAL 2 MONTH)  
        AND
            r.max_date
GROUP BY 
    Product,
    Pv_Plus_Cap,
    Month_And_Year,
    m.Date
ORDER BY 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM m.Date) DESC,
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM m.Date) ASC
LIMIT 3000
)

SELECT
    Product,
    ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN Date = max_date THEN Pv_Plus_Cap ELSE 0 END), 0),2) AS Month_3,
    ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN Date = DATE_SUB(r.max_date, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)  THEN Pv_Plus_Cap ELSE 0 END), 0),2) AS Month_2,
    ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN Date = DATE_SUB(r.max_date, INTERVAL 2 MONTH)  THEN Pv_Plus_Cap ELSE 0 END), 0),2) AS Month_1
FROM
    mainT,
    DateRange r
GROUP BY
    Product

queries.name: Good Case SVI
queries.sql:
WITH SALES as (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)), MONTH) as Month, 
        SUM(SALES_AMOUNT) as SalesValue, 
        SUM(SALES_AMOUNT) * (1.05 + (RAND() * 0.01 - 0.005)) as m_value,

     from KEYSTONE_DKSH_HK.SALES_VIEW 
    WHERE PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)) >= DATE(2022, 1, 1)
    GROUP BY Month
),
KEY as (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)), MONTH) as Month, 
from KEYSTONE.DKSH_HK_impact_graph 
    GROUP BY Month
) 
SELECT 
     ROUND(AVG(SalesValue), 2) as NSV_Without_Keystone, 
    ROUND(IFNULL(AVG(m_value), 0), 2) as Fair_Case_with_Keystone,

FROM SALES 
LEFT JOIN KEY

queries.sql:
DECLARE Category STRING; 
SET Category = ( 
SELECT  
CONCAT('(\"', STRING_AGG(DISTINCT Category, '\", \"'), '\")'), 
FROM ( 
with top20 as (select SKU_Description, sum(Sales_Value) Sales_Value from KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW 
where 1=1 
  
Inserts Active PSU 
and PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", Date) between PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2024-01-01') and PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2024-05-07')   
and SKU_Description in (SELECT DISTINCT JSON_VALUE(level_filter, '$.SKU_Description') SKU_Description 
from KEYSTONE.COGNIZANCE_card_details 
--where opportunity_Type = '939e5ed7-02d1-40b4-b8ce-3cb9aea64148'
) 
group by SKU_Description 
order by Sales_Value 
desc limit 20), 

top10 as (select Customer_Name, sum(Sales_Value) sv 
from KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW 
where PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", Date) between PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2024-01-01') and PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2024-05-07')  
  
Inserts Active PSU 
group by Customer_Name 
order by sv 
desc limit 10) 

select Customer_Name, Category, ROUND(count(distinct SKU_Description)*100/NULLIF((select count(distinct SKU_Description) 
from KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW a 
where 1=1  
  
Inserts Active PSU 
and PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", Date) between PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2024-01-01') and PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2024-05-07')  
and a.Category = b.Category ),0),2) Distribution 
from KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW b where 1=1  
  
Inserts Active PSU 
and PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", Date) between PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2024-01-01') and PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2024-05-07') 
and Customer_Name in (select distinct Customer_Name from top10) 
and SKU_Description in (select distinct SKU_Description from top20) 
group by Customer_Name, Category 
 order by Customer_Name asc, Category asc, distribution desc)); 

EXECUTE IMMEDIATE format("""with bigtable as (with top20 as (select SKU_Description, sum(Sales_Value) Sales_Value from KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW where 1=1  Inserts Active PSU and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", Date) between PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '2024-01-01') and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '2024-05-07') and SKU_Description in (SELECT DISTINCT JSON_VALUE(level_filter, '$.SKU_Description') SKU_Description from KEYSTONE.COGNIZANCE_card_details where opportunity_Type = '939e5ed7-02d1-40b4-b8ce-3cb9aea64148') group by SKU_Description order by Sales_Value desc limit 20), top10 as (select Customer_Name, sum(Sales_Value) sv from KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW where PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", Date) between PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '2024-01-01') and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '2024-05-07')  group by Customer_Name order by sv desc limit 10 ) select Customer_Name, Category, ROUND(count(distinct SKU_Description)*100/NULLIF((select count(distinct SKU_Description) from KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW a where 1=1  and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", Date) between PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '2024-01-01') and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '2024-05-07') and a.Category = b.Category ),0),2) Distribution from KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW b where 1=1  and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", Date) between PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '2024-01-01') and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '2024-05-07') and Customer_Name in (select distinct Customer_Name from top10) and SKU_Description in (select distinct SKU_Description from top20) and Category is not null group by Customer_Name, Category order by Customer_Name asc, Category asc, distribution desc ) SELECT * FROM bigtable PIVOT(SUM(Distribution) AS Distribution FOR Category in %s) ORDER BY Customer_Name ASC""", Category);

queries.name: Regional Category Distribution
queries.sql:
WITH top20 AS (
  SELECT 
    SKU_Description,
    SUM(Sales_Value) AS Sales_Value
  FROM 
    `KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW`
  WHERE 
    1 = 1
    
    Inserts Active PSU
    AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', Date) BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '2024-01-01') AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '2024-05-07')
    AND SKU_Description IN (
      SELECT DISTINCT JSON_VALUE(level_filter, '$.SKU_Description') AS SKU_Description
      FROM `KEYSTONE.COGNIZANCE_card_details`
      --WHERE opportunity_Type = '939e5ed7-02d1-40b4-b8ce-3cb9aea64148'
    )
  GROUP BY 
    SKU_Description
  ORDER BY 
    Sales_Value DESC
  LIMIT 20
),
total AS (
  SELECT 
    LOWER(Region) AS Region,
    Category,
    COUNT(DISTINCT Customer_Name) AS Customer_Count
  FROM 
    `KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW`
  WHERE 
    1 = 1
    
    Inserts Active PSU
    AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', Date) BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '2024-01-01') AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '2024-05-07')
  GROUP BY 
    Region, Category
)
SELECT 
  Region,
  Category,
  ROUND(100 * SUM(cust_count) / NULLIF((AVG(customer_count) * AVG(sku_total)), 0), 2) AS Distribution
FROM (
  SELECT 
    a.Region,
    a.Category,
    SKU_Description,
    COUNT(DISTINCT Customer_Name) AS cust_count,
    Customer_Count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT SKU_Description) OVER (PARTITION BY a.Category) AS sku_total
  FROM 
    `KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW` a
  LEFT JOIN 
    total ON LOWER(a.Region) = total.Region AND a.Category = total.Category
  WHERE 
    1 = 1
    
    Inserts Active PSU
    AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', Date) BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '2024-01-01') AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '2024-05-07')
    AND a.Region IS NOT NULL
    AND a.Category IS NOT NULL
    AND SKU_Description IN (SELECT DISTINCT SKU_Description FROM top20)
  GROUP BY 
    Category, Region, SKU_Description, Customer_Count
)
GROUP BY 
  Region, Category;

queries.sql:
DECLARE Trade_Channel STRING;

SET Trade_Channel = (
    SELECT CONCAT('("', STRING_AGG(DISTINCT Trade_Channel, '", "'), '")')
    FROM (
        WITH total AS (
            SELECT 
                LOWER(Trade_Channel) AS Trade_Channel,
                COUNT(DISTINCT Customer_Name) AS Customer_Count
            FROM

            WHERE 
                1 = 1 
                
                Inserts Active PSU
                AND PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", Date) BETWEEN 
                    PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2024-01-01') AND 
                    PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2024-05-07')
            GROUP BY Trade_Channel
        )
        SELECT 
            REPLACE(a.Trade_Channel, '/', '_') AS Trade_Channel,
            SKU_Description,
            ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT Customer_Name) * 100 / Customer_Count, 2) AS Distribution
        FROM 
            KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW a
        LEFT JOIN 
            total ON LOWER(a.Trade_Channel) = total.Trade_Channel
        WHERE 
            1 = 1 
            
            AND PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", Date) BETWEEN 
                PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2024-01-01') AND 
                PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2024-05-07')
        GROUP BY 
            SKU_Description, Trade_Channel, Customer_Count
        ORDER BY 
            Distribution ASC
    )
);

EXECUTE IMMEDIATE format("""with bigtable as (with total as (Select lower(Trade_Channel) Trade_Channel, count(distinct Customer_Name) Customer_Count from KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW where 1=1  Inserts Active PSU and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", Date) between PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '2024-01-01') and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '2024-05-07') group by Trade_Channel) select REPLACE(a.Trade_Channel, '/', '_') Trade_Channel, SKU_Description, ROUND(count(distinct Customer_Name)*100/Customer_Count,2) Distribution from KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW a left join total on lower(a.Trade_Channel) = total.Trade_Channel where 1=1  and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", Date) between PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '2024-01-01') and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '2024-05-07') and SKU_Description in (select SKU_Description from (select SKU_Description, count(distinct Customer_Name) customer_count from KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW where 1=1  Inserts Active PSU and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", Date) between PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '2024-01-01') and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '2024-05-07') group by SKU_Description order by customer_count desc limit 5)) group by SKU_Description, Trade_Channel, Customer_Count order by Distribution asc ) SELECT * FROM bigtable PIVOT(SUM(Distribution) AS Distribution FOR Trade_Channel in %s) order by SKU_Description """, Trade_Channel)

queries.name: Product Breakdown Table
queries.sql:
WITH \r
    Data \r
AS\r
( \r
SELECT \r
    m.Lines_of_Business_Level_Description AS Product,\r
    DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE("%Y%m%d", REGEXP_EXTRACT(m.Filename, r'([0-9]{8})')), MONTH) AS Date,\r
    SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy) AS Pv_Plus_Cap,\r
FROM \r
    QUINCE.xfinFIN m\r
-- CROSS JOIN\r
--     Total_Pv_Table b\r
WHERE 1=1\r
    \r
GROUP BY \r
    m.Lines_of_Business_Level_Description,\r
    Date\r
ORDER BY \r
    Date DESC\r
LIMIT 1000\r
)\r
\r
,Total_Pv_Table \r
AS\r
(\r
SELECT \r
    DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE("%Y%m%d", REGEXP_EXTRACT(Filename, r'([0-9]{8})')), MONTH) AS Date,\r
    SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy) AS Total_PV\r
FROM \r
    QUINCE.xfinFIN\r
GROUP BY \r
    Date\r
ORDER BY \r
    Date DESC\r
LIMIT 1000    \r
)\r
\r
SELECT \r
    *\r
FROM\r
(\r
SELECT \r
    Product,\r
    m.Date,\r
    Pv_Plus_Cap,\r
    -- Total_PV,\r
    CONCAT\r
    (\r
    CASE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM m.Date)\r
        WHEN 1 THEN 'January'\r
        WHEN 2 THEN 'February'\r
        WHEN 3 THEN 'March'\r
        WHEN 4 THEN 'April'\r
        WHEN 5 THEN 'May'\r
        WHEN 6 THEN 'June'\r
        WHEN 7 THEN 'July'\r
        WHEN 8 THEN 'August'\r
        WHEN 9 THEN 'September'\r
        WHEN 10 THEN 'October'\r
        WHEN 11 THEN 'November'\r
        WHEN 12 THEN 'December'\r
        ELSE 'Unknown'\r
    END, ' ',\r
        CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM m.Date) AS STRING)\r
    )  \r
    AS \r
        Month_And_Year,\r
    ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN TRUE THEN Pv_Plus_Cap ELSE 0 END) / Total_PV, 0),2) AS Total_Perc\r
FROM\r
    Data m\r
LEFT JOIN\r
    Total_Pv_Table b\r
ON \r
    m.Date = b.Date\r
WHERE 1=1\r
     \r
    \r
-- WHERE 1=1\r
--      AND m.Date >= PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2017-01-01')  \r
--      AND m.Date <= PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2017-01-17') \r
GROUP BY \r
    Product,\r
    Total_PV,\r
    Pv_Plus_Cap,\r

queries.name: Least Distributed Product
queries.sql:
DECLARE Trade_Channel STRING;

SET Trade_Channel = (
    SELECT CONCAT('("', STRING_AGG(DISTINCT Trade_Channel, '", "'), '")')
    FROM (
        WITH total AS (
            SELECT LOWER(Trade_Channel) AS Trade_Channel, COUNT(DISTINCT Region) AS Customer_Count
            FROM KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW
            WHERE 1=1
            
            Inserts Active PSU
            AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', Date) BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '2024-01-01') AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '2024-05-08')
            GROUP BY Trade_Channel
        )
        SELECT REPLACE(a.Trade_Channel, '/', '_') AS Trade_Channel, SKU_Description, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT Region) * 100 / Customer_Count, 2) AS Distribution
        FROM KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW a
        LEFT JOIN total ON LOWER(a.Trade_Channel) = total.Trade_Channel
        WHERE 1=1
        
        AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', Date) BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '2024-01-01') AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '2024-05-08')
        GROUP BY SKU_Description, Trade_Channel, Customer_Count
        ORDER BY Distribution ASC
    )
);

EXECUTE IMMEDIATE format("WITH bigtable AS ( WITH total AS ( SELECT LOWER(Trade_Channel) AS Trade_Channel, COUNT(DISTINCT Region) AS Customer_Count FROM KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW WHERE 1=1  Inserts Active PSU AND PARSE_DATE('%%Y-%%m-%%d', Date) BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%%Y-%%m-%%d', '2024-01-01') AND PARSE_DATE('%%Y-%%m-%%d', '2024-05-08') GROUP BY Trade_Channel ) SELECT REPLACE(a.Trade_Channel, '/', '_') AS Trade_Channel, SKU_Description, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT Region) * 100 / Customer_Count, 2) AS Distribution FROM KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW a LEFT JOIN total ON LOWER(a.Trade_Channel) = total.Trade_Channel WHERE 1=1  AND PARSE_DATE('%%Y-%%m-%%d', Date) BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%%Y-%%m-%%d', '2024-01-01') AND PARSE_DATE('%%Y-%%m-%%d', '2024-05-08') AND SKU_Description IN ( SELECT SKU_Description FROM ( SELECT SKU_Description, COUNT(DISTINCT Region) AS customer_count FROM KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW WHERE 1=1  Inserts Active PSU AND PARSE_DATE('%%Y-%%m-%%d', Date) BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%%Y-%%m-%%d', '2024-01-01') AND PARSE_DATE('%%Y-%%m-%%d', '2024-05-08') GROUP BY SKU_Description ORDER BY customer_count ASC LIMIT 5 ) ) GROUP BY SKU_Description, Trade_Channel, Customer_Count ORDER BY Distribution ASC ) SELECT * FROM bigtable PIVOT(SUM(Distribution) AS Distribution FOR Trade_Channel IN %s) ORDER BY SKU_Description", Trade_Channel);

queries.name: Bottom 5 Users Table
queries.sql:
WITH archive_split AS (
SELECT SUBSTR(CAST(created_on AS STRING), 1, 10) AS Date_Created, split(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(assigned_to, '\"', ''), ' ', ''), '[', ''), ']', ''), ',') AS assigned_to,
ROUND(m_value *7,2) AS Value 
FROM `KEYSTONE.COGNIZANCE_card_archive` AS archive
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.kanban_lists` AS lists 
ON archive.list_id = lists.id
WHERE lists.key in ('LM4') AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(opp_label, '"0a5c25c7-911b-4d3f-bef7-5326a19fc897"') AND level= 1
-- 
AND PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(cast(`date` as string),1,10) ) 
between PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '2024-01-01') AND  PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '2024-05-08')),
details_split AS (SELECT SUBSTR(CAST(created_on AS STRING), 1, 10) AS Date_Created, split(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(assigned_to, '\"', ''), ' ', ''), '[', ''), ']', ''), '') 
AS assigned_to,
ROUND(m_value *7,2) AS Value 
FROM `KEYSTONE.COGNIZANCE_card_details` AS details
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.COGNIZANCE_card_status` AS status
ON details.id = status.id
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.kanban_lists` AS lists 
ON status.list_id = lists.id
WHERE lists.key in ('LM4') AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(opp_label, '"0a5c25c7-911b-4d3f-bef7-5326a19fc897"') AND level= 1
-- 
AND PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(cast(`created_on` as string),1,10) ) 
<= PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '2024-05-08')
), 
pending AS (SELECT assigned_to, ROUND(SUM(Value), 2) AS sum_opp_pending
FROM details_split
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(details_split.assigned_to) AS assigned_to
WHERE assigned_to != '' AND assigned_to IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY sum_opp_pending DESC),
resolved AS (SELECT assigned_to, ROUND(SUM(Value), 2) AS sum_opp_resolved
FROM archive_split
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(archive_split.assigned_to) AS assigned_to
WHERE assigned_to != '' AND assigned_to IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY sum_opp_resolved DESC), 

conv_rat AS (SELECT assigned_to, IFNULL(ROUND(SUM(sum_opp_resolved)/NULLIF(SUM(sum_opp_pending) + SUM(sum_opp_resolved),0),2),0) AS Efficiency_Rate
FROM (SELECT IF(pending.assigned_to IS NULL, resolved.assigned_to, pending.assigned_to) AS assigned_to, 
IFNULL(pending.sum_opp_pending,0) AS sum_opp_pending, IFNULL(resolved.sum_opp_resolved,0) AS sum_opp_resolved
FROM pending 
FULL OUTER JOIN resolved
ON pending.assigned_to = resolved.assigned_to)
GROUP BY assigned_to), 
store_rat AS (
SELECT assigned_to, IFNULL(ROUND(SUM(sum_opp_resolved)/NULLIF(SUM(sum_opp_pending),0)*100,2),0) AS Store_Perc_Ratio
FROM (SELECT IF(pending.assigned_to IS NULL, resolved.assigned_to, pending.assigned_to) AS assigned_to, 
IFNULL(pending.sum_opp_pending,0) AS sum_opp_pending, IFNULL(resolved.sum_opp_resolved,0) AS sum_opp_resolved
FROM pending 
FULL OUTER JOIN resolved
ON pending.assigned_to = resolved.assigned_to)
GROUP BY assigned_to
)SELECT Distinct resolved.assigned_to AS Username, sum_opp_resolved AS Contribution, Efficiency_Rate
FROM resolved
FULL OUTER JOIN conv_rat
ON resolved.assigned_to = conv_rat.assigned_to
FULL OUTER JOIN store_rat
ON resolved.assigned_to = store_rat.assigned_to
WHERE resolved.assigned_to IS NOT NULL 
ORDER BY Contribution asc 
LIMIT 5

queries.name: Regional Category Distribution
queries.sql:
WITH top20 AS (
  SELECT 
    SKU_Description,
    SUM(Sales_Value) AS Sales_Value
  FROM 
    `KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW`
  WHERE 
    1 = 1
    
    Inserts Active PSU
    AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', Date) BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '2024-01-01') AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '2024-05-07')
    AND SKU_Description IN (
      SELECT DISTINCT JSON_VALUE(level_filter, '$.SKU_Description') AS SKU_Description
      FROM `KEYSTONE.COGNIZANCE_card_details`
      --WHERE opportunity_Type = '939e5ed7-02d1-40b4-b8ce-3cb9aea64148'
    )
  GROUP BY 
    SKU_Description
  ORDER BY 
    Sales_Value DESC
  LIMIT 20
),
total AS (
  SELECT 
    LOWER(Region) AS Region,
    Category,
    COUNT(DISTINCT Customer_Name) AS Customer_Count
  FROM 
    `KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW`
  WHERE 
    1 = 1
    
    Inserts Active PSU
    AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', Date) BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '2024-01-01') AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '2024-05-07')
  GROUP BY 
    Region, Category
)
SELECT 
  Region,
  Category,
  ROUND(100 * SUM(cust_count) / NULLIF((AVG(customer_count) * AVG(sku_total)), 0), 2) AS Distribution
FROM (
  SELECT 
    a.Region,
    a.Category,
    SKU_Description,
    COUNT(DISTINCT Customer_Name) AS cust_count,
    Customer_Count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT SKU_Description) OVER (PARTITION BY a.Category) AS sku_total
  FROM 
    `KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW` a
  LEFT JOIN 
    total ON LOWER(a.Region) = total.Region AND a.Category = total.Category
  WHERE 
    1 = 1
    
    Inserts Active PSU
    AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', Date) BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '2024-01-01') AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '2024-05-07')
    AND a.Region IS NOT NULL
    AND a.Category IS NOT NULL
    AND SKU_Description IN (SELECT DISTINCT SKU_Description FROM top20)
  GROUP BY 
    Category, Region, SKU_Description, Customer_Count
)
GROUP BY 
  Region, Category;

        SELECT REPLACE(a.Trade_Channel, '/', '_') AS Trade_Channel, SKU_Description, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT Region) * 100 / Customer_Count, 2) AS Distribution
        FROM KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW a
        LEFT JOIN total ON LOWER(a.Trade_Channel) = total.Trade_Channel
        WHERE 1=1
        
        AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', Date) BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '2024-01-01') AND PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', '2024-05-08')
        GROUP BY SKU_Description, Trade_Channel, Customer_Count
        ORDER BY Distribution ASC
    )
);

EXECUTE IMMEDIATE format("WITH bigtable AS ( WITH total AS ( SELECT LOWER(Trade_Channel) AS Trade_Channel, COUNT(DISTINCT Region) AS Customer_Count FROM KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW WHERE 1=1  Inserts Active PSU AND PARSE_DATE('%%Y-%%m-%%d', Date) BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%%Y-%%m-%%d', '2024-01-01') AND PARSE_DATE('%%Y-%%m-%%d', '2024-05-08') GROUP BY Trade_Channel ) SELECT REPLACE(a.Trade_Channel, '/', '_') AS Trade_Channel, SKU_Description, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT Region) * 100 / Customer_Count, 2) AS Distribution FROM KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW a LEFT JOIN total ON LOWER(a.Trade_Channel) = total.Trade_Channel WHERE 1=1  AND PARSE_DATE('%%Y-%%m-%%d', Date) BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%%Y-%%m-%%d', '2024-01-01') AND PARSE_DATE('%%Y-%%m-%%d', '2024-05-08') AND SKU_Description IN ( SELECT SKU_Description FROM ( SELECT SKU_Description, COUNT(DISTINCT Region) AS customer_count FROM KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW WHERE 1=1  Inserts Active PSU AND PARSE_DATE('%%Y-%%m-%%d', Date) BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%%Y-%%m-%%d', '2024-01-01') AND PARSE_DATE('%%Y-%%m-%%d', '2024-05-08') GROUP BY SKU_Description ORDER BY customer_count ASC LIMIT 5 ) ) GROUP BY SKU_Description, Trade_Channel, Customer_Count ORDER BY Distribution ASC ) SELECT * FROM bigtable PIVOT(SUM(Distribution) AS Distribution FOR Trade_Channel IN %s) ORDER BY SKU_Description", Trade_Channel);

queries.name: Most distributed product
queries.sql:
DECLARE Trade_Channel STRING;

SET Trade_Channel = (
    SELECT CONCAT('("', STRING_AGG(DISTINCT Trade_Channel, '", "'), '")')
    FROM (
        WITH total AS (
            SELECT 
                LOWER(Trade_Channel) AS Trade_Channel,
                COUNT(DISTINCT Customer_Name) AS Customer_Count
            FROM 
                KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW 
            WHERE 
                1 = 1 
                
                Inserts Active PSU
                AND PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", Date) BETWEEN 
                    PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2024-01-01') AND 
                    PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2024-05-07')
            GROUP BY Trade_Channel
        )
        SELECT 
            REPLACE(a.Trade_Channel, '/', '_') AS Trade_Channel,
            SKU_Description,
            ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT Customer_Name) * 100 / Customer_Count, 2) AS Distribution
        FROM 
            KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW a
        LEFT JOIN 
            total ON LOWER(a.Trade_Channel) = total.Trade_Channel
        WHERE 
            1 = 1 
            
            AND PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", Date) BETWEEN 
                PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2024-01-01') AND 
                PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2024-05-07')
        GROUP BY 
            SKU_Description, Trade_Channel, Customer_Count
        ORDER BY 
            Distribution ASC
    )
);

EXECUTE IMMEDIATE format("""with bigtable as (with total as (Select lower(Trade_Channel) Trade_Channel, count(distinct Customer_Name) Customer_Count from KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW where 1=1  Inserts Active PSU and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", Date) between PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '2024-01-01') and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '2024-05-07') group by Trade_Channel) select REPLACE(a.Trade_Channel, '/', '_') Trade_Channel, SKU_Description, ROUND(count(distinct Customer_Name)*100/Customer_Count,2) Distribution from KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW a left join total on lower(a.Trade_Channel) = total.Trade_Channel where 1=1  and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", Date) between PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '2024-01-01') and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '2024-05-07') and SKU_Description in (select SKU_Description from (select SKU_Description, count(distinct Customer_Name) customer_count from KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW where 1=1  Inserts Active PSU and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", Date) between PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '2024-01-01') and PARSE_DATE("%%Y-%%m-%%d", '2024-05-07') group by SKU_Description order by customer_count desc limit 5)) group by SKU_Description, Trade_Channel, Customer_Count order by Distribution asc ) SELECT * FROM bigtable PIVOT(SUM(Distribution) AS Distribution FOR Trade_Channel in %s) order by SKU_Description """, Trade_Channel)

queries.name: User Vals Heat Map
queries.sql:
WITH assign_split AS ( 
SELECT DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', Date_Resolved), WEEK(MONDAY)) AS Date_Resolved, assigned_to, opportunity_type, Value 
FROM ( 
SELECT SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10) AS Date_Resolved, 
split(TRIM(TRIM(assigned_to, '['), ']'),',') AS assigned_to, 
opportunity_type, 
ROUND(m_value*7,2) as Value 
FROM `KEYSTONE.COGNIZANCE_card_archive` AS archive 
LEFT JOIN `KEYSTONE.kanban_lists` AS lists 
ON archive.list_id = lists.id 
WHERE lists.key in ('LM4') 
-- 
AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(opp_label, '"0a5c25c7-911b-4d3f-bef7-5326a19fc897"') AND level= 1 
) 
WHERE PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', Date_Resolved) between PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '2024-01-01') AND  PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', '2024-05-08')), 
opportunity_type_ranking AS ( 
SELECT Ranking, opportunity_type, Value 
FROM ( 
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (Order by Value DESC) AS Ranking, opportunity_type, Value 
FROM ( 
SELECT opportunity_type, SUM(Value) AS Value 
FROM assign_split 
GROUP BY opportunity_type)) 
WHERE Ranking <= 10) 
SELECT Date_Resolved, a.assigned_to, a.opportunity_type, a.Value 
FROM ( 
SELECT Date_Resolved, assigned_to, opportunity_type, IFNULL(ROUND(SUM(Value),2),0) AS Value 
FROM assign_split 
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(assign_split.assigned_to) AS assigned_to 
WHERE assigned_to != '' AND assigned_to IS NOT NULL 
AND TRIM(TRIM(assigned_to), '\"') = '' 
AND opportunity_type IS NOT NULL 
GROUP BY Date_Resolved, assigned_to, opportunity_type 
ORDER BY Date_Resolved 
) a 
INNER JOIN opportunity_type_ranking 
ON a.opportunity_type = opportunity_type_ranking.opportunity_type 
ORDER BY Value desc

queries.name: Big Table Quince Aging Query (Copy)
queries.sql:
\r
with Customer_Stage as (\r
  SELECT EXTR_Customer_Name, IF((EXTR_90_Days+EXTR_90plus_Days)>0, "stage3", IF(EXTR_60_Days>0, "stage2", "stage1")) Stage from (\r
SELECT EXTR_Customer_Name, SUM(EXTR_90_Days) EXTR_90_Days, SUM(EXTR_90plus_Days) EXTR_90plus_Days, SUM(EXTR_60_Days) EXTR_60_Days, SUM(EXTR_30_Days) EXTR_30_Days, SUM(EXTR_Current) EXTR_Current, SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy) EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy from QUINCE.xfinFIN\r
where TRIM(SIC_Sector) != ''\r
group by EXTR_Customer_Name\r
))\r
\r
select DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE("%Y%m%d", REGEXP_EXTRACT(Filename, r'([0-9]{8})')), MONTH) Calculated_Stages_Date, \r
ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN Stage="stage1" THEN EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy ELSE 0 END) / SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy), 0),2) AS Stage_1_Perc,\r
ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN Stage="stage1" THEN EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy ELSE 0 END), 0),2) AS Stage_1_PV,\r
\r
ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN Stage="stage2" THEN EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy ELSE 0 END) / SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy), 0),2) AS Stage_2_Perc,\r
ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN Stage="stage2" THEN EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy ELSE 0 END), 0),2) AS Stage_2_PV,\r
\r
ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN Stage="stage3" THEN EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy ELSE 0 END) / SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy), 0),2) AS Stage_3_Perc,\r
ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN Stage="stage3" THEN EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy ELSE 0 END), 0),2) AS Stage_3_PV,\r
\r
from (\r
SELECT A.*, Stage  from QUINCE.xfinFIN A\r
\r
left join Customer_Stage CS on \r
A.EXTR_Customer_Name = CS.EXTR_Customer_Name\r
\r
where TRIM(SIC_Sector) != ''\r
\r
 \r
 \r
\r
\r
)\r
group by Calculated_Stages_Date\r
order by Calculated_Stages_Date asc\r

queries.name: Keystone vs Without Keystone
queries.sql:
WITH SALES as (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)), MONTH) as Month, 
        SUM(Sales_Value) as SalesValue, 
        SUM(Sales_Value) * (1.05 + (RAND() * 0.01 - 0.005)) as m_value,
        SUM(Sales_Value) * (1.10 + (RAND() * 0.01 - 0.005)) as m_value_1,
        SUM(Sales_Value) * (1.15 + (RAND() * 0.01 - 0.005)) as m_value_2,

     from KEYSTONE_PEPSICO_MOZAMBIQUE.SALES_VIEW 
    WHERE PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)) >= DATE(2022, 1, 1)
    GROUP BY Month
)
SELECT Date, NSV_Without_Keystone, Fair_Case_with_Keystone+NSV_Without_Keystone Fair_Case_with_Keystone, 
Good_Case_with_Keystone+NSV_Without_Keystone Good_Case_with_Keystone, 
Excellent_Case_with_Keystone+NSV_Without_Keystone Excellent_Case_with_Keystone from (
SELECT Date, 
NSV_Without_Keystone,
SUM(NSV_Without_Keystone) OVER (ORDER BY Date) AS NSV_Without_Keystone_Cum,

SUM(Fair_Case_with_Keystone-NSV_Without_Keystone) OVER (ORDER BY Date) AS Fair_Case_with_Keystone,
SUM(Good_Case_with_Keystone-NSV_Without_Keystone) OVER (ORDER BY Date) AS Good_Case_with_Keystone,
SUM(Excellent_Case_with_Keystone-NSV_Without_Keystone) OVER (ORDER BY Date) AS Excellent_Case_with_Keystone,

from (
SELECT 
    SALES.Month as Date, 
    ROUND(SalesValue, 2) as NSV_Without_Keystone, 
    ROUND(IFNULL(m_value, 0), 2) as Fair_Case_with_Keystone, 
    ROUND(IFNULL(m_value_1, 0), 2) as Good_Case_with_Keystone, 
    ROUND(IFNULL(m_value_2, 0), 2) as Excellent_Case_with_Keystone,


FROM SALES 

WHERE SALES.Month BETWEEN DATE('2023-01-01') AND DATE('2023-12-12')
ORDER BY Date)
)

queries.name: Keystone vs Without Keystone
queries.sql:
WITH SALES as (

        SUM(Sales_Value) as SalesValue
     from KEYSTONE_PEPSICO_MOZAMBIQUE.SALES_VIEW 
    WHERE PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)) BETWEEN DATE(2023, 8, 1) AND DATE(2024, 3, 1)
    GROUP BY WEEK
),
KEY as (with daterange as (SELECT Week, row_number() over(order by Week asc) as row_num from (SELECT
  distinct DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)), WEEK) as Week
FROM
  UNNEST(GENERATE_DATE_ARRAY('2023-01-01', '2023-12-12')) AS Date))
select Week, SUM(Value) Value from (
select daterange.Week Week, sum(m_value) Value from (
SELECT *, NTILE(31) OVER (PARTITION BY display_value ORDER BY m_value desc) AS date_rank from 
(
  SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, NTILE(100) OVER (PARTITION BY display_value ORDER BY m_value desc) AS perc_rank from KEYSTONE.COKE_card_details) where perc_rank >= 5 and perc_rank <= 20
)
order by date_rank desc)
left join daterange 
on date_rank = row_num 
group by Week
order by Week asc) 
group by Week



) 
SELECT Date, NSV_Without_Keystone, 
Excellent_Case_with_Keystone+NSV_Without_Keystone Excellent_Case_with_Keystone from (

SELECT 
    SALES.Week as Date, 
    ROUND(SalesValue, 2) as NSV_Without_Keystone, 
    ROUND(IFNULL(Value, 0), 2) as Excellent_Case_with_Keystone


FROM SALES 
LEFT JOIN KEY 
ON SALES.Week = KEY.Week
WHERE SALES.Week BETWEEN DATE('2023-02-01') AND DATE('2023-12-12')
ORDER BY Date
)

queries.name: Product Vs PV Per Month
queries.sql:
WITH 
    Data 
AS
( 
SELECT 
    Lines_of_Business_Level_Description AS Product,
    DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE("%Y%m%d", REGEXP_EXTRACT(Filename, r'([0-9]{8})')), MONTH) AS Date,
    SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy) AS Pv_Plus_Cap,
FROM 
    QUINCE.xfinFIN 
GROUP BY 
    Lines_of_Business_Level_Description,
    Date
ORDER BY 
    Date DESC
LIMIT 1000
)

,DateRange 
AS 
(
  SELECT 
    MAX(Date) AS max_date
  FROM 
    Data
)

,mainT
AS
(
SELECT 
    Product,
    m.Date As Date,
    Pv_Plus_Cap,
    CONCAT
    (
    CASE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM m.Date)
        WHEN 1 THEN 'January'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'February'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'March'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'April'
        WHEN 5 THEN 'May'
        WHEN 6 THEN 'June'
        WHEN 7 THEN 'July'
        WHEN 8 THEN 'August'
        WHEN 9 THEN 'September'
        WHEN 10 THEN 'October'
        WHEN 11 THEN 'November'
        WHEN 12 THEN 'December'
        ELSE 'Unknown'
    END, ' ',
        CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM m.Date) AS STRING)
    )  
    AS 
        Month_And_Year,
FROM
    Data m,
    DateRange r
WHERE 1=1
AND 
    m.Date 
        BETWEEN 
            DATE_SUB(r.max_date, INTERVAL 2 MONTH)  
        AND
            r.max_date
GROUP BY 
    Product,
    Pv_Plus_Cap,
    Month_And_Year,
    m.Date
ORDER BY 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM m.Date) DESC,
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM m.Date) ASC
LIMIT 3000
)

SELECT
    Product,
    ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN Date = max_date THEN Pv_Plus_Cap ELSE 0 END), 0),2) AS Month_3,
    ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN Date = DATE_SUB(r.max_date, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)  THEN Pv_Plus_Cap ELSE 0 END), 0),2) AS Month_2,
    ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN Date = DATE_SUB(r.max_date, INTERVAL 2 MONTH)  THEN Pv_Plus_Cap ELSE 0 END), 0),2) AS Month_1
FROM
    mainT,
    DateRange r
GROUP BY
    Product

queries.name: Product Breakdown Table
queries.sql:
WITH \r
    Data \r
AS\r
( \r
SELECT \r
    m.Lines_of_Business_Level_Description AS Product,\r
    DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE("%Y%m%d", REGEXP_EXTRACT(m.Filename, r'([0-9]{8})')), MONTH) AS Date,\r
    SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy) AS Pv_Plus_Cap,\r
FROM \r
    QUINCE.xfinFIN m\r
-- CROSS JOIN\r
--     Total_Pv_Table b\r
WHERE 1=1\r
    \r
GROUP BY \r
    m.Lines_of_Business_Level_Description,\r
    Date\r
ORDER BY \r
    Date DESC\r
LIMIT 1000\r
)\r
\r
,Total_Pv_Table \r
AS\r
(\r
SELECT \r
    DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE("%Y%m%d", REGEXP_EXTRACT(Filename, r'([0-9]{8})')), MONTH) AS Date,\r
    SUM(EXTR_PV_plus_Capital_Rpy) AS Total_PV\r
FROM \r
    QUINCE.xfinFIN\r
GROUP BY \r
    Date\r
ORDER BY \r
    Date DESC\r
LIMIT 1000    \r
)\r
\r
SELECT \r
    *\r
FROM\r
(\r
SELECT \r
    Product,\r
    m.Date,\r
    Pv_Plus_Cap,\r
    -- Total_PV,\r
    CONCAT\r
    (\r
    CASE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM m.Date)\r
        WHEN 1 THEN 'January'\r
        WHEN 2 THEN 'February'\r
        WHEN 3 THEN 'March'\r
        WHEN 4 THEN 'April'\r
        WHEN 5 THEN 'May'\r
        WHEN 6 THEN 'June'\r
        WHEN 7 THEN 'July'\r
        WHEN 8 THEN 'August'\r
        WHEN 9 THEN 'September'\r
        WHEN 10 THEN 'October'\r
        WHEN 11 THEN 'November'\r
        WHEN 12 THEN 'December'\r
        ELSE 'Unknown'\r
    END, ' ',\r
        CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM m.Date) AS STRING)\r
    )  \r
    AS \r
        Month_And_Year,\r
    ROUND(IFNULL(100*SUM(CASE WHEN TRUE THEN Pv_Plus_Cap ELSE 0 END) / Total_PV, 0),2) AS Total_Perc\r
FROM\r
    Data m\r
LEFT JOIN\r
    Total_Pv_Table b\r
ON \r
    m.Date = b.Date\r
WHERE 1=1\r
     \r
    \r
-- WHERE 1=1\r
--      AND m.Date >= PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2017-01-01')  \r
--      AND m.Date <= PARSE_DATE("%Y-%m-%d", '2017-01-17') \r
GROUP BY \r
    Product,\r
    Total_PV,\r
    Pv_Plus_Cap,\r
    Month_And_Year,\r
    m.Date\r
ORDER BY \r
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM m.Date) DESC,\r
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM m.Date) ASC\r
LIMIT 1000\r
)\r
WHERE 1=1\r
    \r
LIMIT 3000\r
    \r

        DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)), MONTH) as Month, 
        SUM(Sales_Value) as SalesValue, 
        SUM(Sales_Value) * (1.05 + (RAND() * 0.01 - 0.005)) as m_value,
        SUM(Sales_Value) * (1.10 + (RAND() * 0.01 - 0.005)) as m_value_1,
        SUM(Sales_Value) * (1.15 + (RAND() * 0.01 - 0.005)) as m_value_2,

     from KEYSTONE_PEPSICO_MOZAMBIQUE.SALES_VIEW 
    WHERE PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)) >= DATE(2022, 1, 1)
    GROUP BY Month
),
KEY as (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)), MONTH) as Month, 
from KEYSTONE.COKE_impact_graph 
    GROUP BY Month
) 
SELECT 
    SALES.Month as Date, 
    ROUND(SalesValue, 2) as NSV_Without_Keystone, 
    ROUND(IFNULL(m_value, 0), 2) as Fair_Case_with_Keystone, 
    ROUND(IFNULL(m_value_1, 0), 2) as Good_Case_with_Keystone, 
    ROUND(IFNULL(m_value_2, 0), 2) as Excellent_Case_with_Keystone,


FROM SALES 
LEFT JOIN KEY 
ON SALES.Month = KEY.Month
WHERE SALES.Month BETWEEN DATE('2023-01-01') AND DATE('2023-12-12')
ORDER BY Date

queries.name: Keystone vs Without Keystone
queries.sql:
WITH SALES as (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)), WEEK) as Week, 
        SUM(Sales_Value) as SalesValue
     from KEYSTONE_PEPSICO_MOZAMBIQUE.SALES_VIEW 
    WHERE PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)) BETWEEN DATE(2023, 8, 1) AND DATE(2024, 3, 1)
    GROUP BY WEEK
),
KEY as (with daterange as (SELECT Week, row_number() over(order by Week asc) as row_num from (SELECT
  distinct DATE_TRUNC(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', SUBSTR(CAST(Date AS STRING), 1, 10)), WEEK) as Week
FROM
  UNNEST(GENERATE_DATE_ARRAY('2023-08-01', '2023-12-12')) AS Date))
select Week, SUM(Value) Value from (
select daterange.Week Week, sum(m_value) Value from (
SELECT *, NTILE(31) OVER (PARTITION BY display_value ORDER BY m_value desc) AS date_rank from 
(
  SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, NTILE(100) OVER (PARTITION BY display_value ORDER BY m_value desc) AS perc_rank from KEYSTONE.COKE_card_details) where perc_rank >= 5 and perc_rank <= 20
)
order by date_rank desc)
left join daterange 
on date_rank = row_num 
group by Week
order by Week asc) 
group by Week



) 
SELECT Date, NSV_Without_Keystone, 
Excellent_Case_with_Keystone+NSV_Without_Keystone Excellent_Case_with_Keystone from (
SELECT Date, 
NSV_Without_Keystone,
SUM(Excellent_Case_with_Keystone) OVER (ORDER BY Date) AS Excellent_Case_with_Keystone,

from (
SELECT 
    SALES.Week as Date, 
    ROUND(SalesValue, 2) as NSV_Without_Keystone, 
    ROUND(IFNULL(Value, 0), 2) as Excellent_Case_with_Keystone


FROM SALES 
LEFT JOIN KEY 
ON SALES.Week = KEY.Week
WHERE SALES.Week BETWEEN DATE('2023-01-01') AND DATE('2023-12-12')
ORDER BY Date
))

queries.name: asd
queries.sql:
SELECT SKU_Description, AVG_REPLENISHMENT_CYCLE as Sales_Frequency\r
FROM (\r
\r
SELECT SKU_Description, round(AVG(REPLENISHMENT_CYCLE)) AS AVG_REPLENISHMENT_CYCLE, count(*) AS COUNTER\r
FROM (\r
\r
SELECT *, \r
DATE_DIFF(PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(Date,1,10) ),PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(LAG_DATE,1,10) ), DAY) \r
AS REPLENISHMENT_CYCLE\r
FROM ( \r
select *, LAG(Date)\r
   OVER (PARTITION BY Customer_Name, SKU_Description ORDER BY Date ASC) AS LAG_DATE\r
from (\r
 \r
SELECT Customer_Name, SKU_Description, Sales_Value, Sales_Qty, Date\r
 \r
from KEYSTONE_COGNIZANCE.SALES_VIEW\r
\r
where \r
Customer_Name = 'CASH' \r
and Variant = JSON_VALUE('{"Brand":"LAYS","Category":"Snack","City":"MAPUTO","Country":"Mozambique","Customer_Code":"MP-JOA0054","Customer_Name":"JOAO","Flavour":"Sweet & Smoky American BBQ","Region":"Other","SKU_Description":"LAYS SMOKEY BBQ 20X105G","SKU_Number":"SM150423","Supplier":"PEPSICO","Trade_Channel":"Other","Variant":"POTATO CHIPS"}', '$.Variant')\r
AND  Supplier = JSON_VALUE('{"Brand":"LAYS","Category":"Snack","City":"MAPUTO","Country":"Mozambique","Customer_Code":"MP-JOA0054","Customer_Name":"JOAO","Flavour":"Sweet & Smoky American BBQ","Region":"Other","SKU_Description":"LAYS SMOKEY BBQ 20X105G","SKU_Number":"SM150423","Supplier":"PEPSICO","Trade_Channel":"Other","Variant":"POTATO CHIPS"}', '$.Supplier')\r
\r
and Sales_Qty > 0\r
and\r
extract(year from PARSE_DATE( '%Y-%m-%d', substring(Date,1,10) )) >= 2021\r
\r
ORDER BY Customer_Name, Date ASC\r
)\r
ORDER BY Customer_Name, SKU_Description, Date\r
\r
)\r
)\r
GROUP BY SKU_Description\r
ORDER BY AVG_REPLENISHMENT_CYCLE DESC\r
) \r
where AVG_REPLENISHMENT_CYCLE is not null\r
and SKU_Description is not null\r
\r
